inputs.label: Face Value
inputs.businessContext: The nominal value of the bond, paid at maturity.

businessContext_i18n.en: The nominal value of the bond, paid at maturity.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennwert der Anleihe, zahlbar bei Fälligkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur nominale de l'obligation, remboursée à l'échéance.

inputs.label: Coupon Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual coupon rate as percentage of face value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual coupon rate as percentage of face value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal değerin yüzdesi olarak yıllık kupon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Kuponzinssatz als Prozentsatz des Nennwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux du coupon annuel en pourcentage de la valeur nominale.

inputs.label: Years to Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Number of years until the bond matures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years until the bond matures.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre bis zur Fälligkeit der Anleihe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années jusqu'à l'échéance de l'obligation.

inputs.label: Yield to Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate (market interest rate) for the bond.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual discount rate (market interest rate) for the bond.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahvil için yıllık iskonto oranı (piyasa faiz oranı).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'actualisation annuel (taux d'intérêt du marché) pour l'obligation.

inputs.label: Coupon Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of coupon payments per year (e.g., 2 for semiannual).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of coupon payments per year (e.g., 2 for semiannual).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık kupon ödemesi sayısı (örneğin altı aylık için 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Kuponzahlungen pro Jahr (z. B. 2 für halbjährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de paiements de coupon par an (ex. 2 pour semestriel).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
